title: Create events from a request span
scenario: A span carries context shared by multiple events. Request-scoped fields should not be rebuilt by every call site.
instructions: Define RequestSpan and an event method that attaches its request_id and path to a LogEvent.

hints.body: Keep the Structured request logging code active and define RequestSpan and an event method that attaches its request_id and path to a LogEvent.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Create events from a request span is shown below.

completionExplanation: Create events from a request span now extends the active Structured request logging code with log request span. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
